{{Infobox event
| name = South Sea Revolution
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The South Sea Revolution, also known as the South Sea Rebellion, was a significant historical conflict involving an insurgent force known as the [[South Sea Revolutionary Army]]. The movement was led by [[Rudeus Maxwell]], a former member of the [[Imperial army]] who had inherited wealth after retiring. The rebellion sought to challenge existing power structures, with some describing its intent as turning power against the powerful. The conflict was characterized by intense violence; for instance, [[Baldezar Kern]], the head of the [[Champion’s Guild]], utilized [[Awakened maces]] capable of causing fiery explosions to sink an entire rebel fleet. One such weapon, still stained with [[Kern]]'s blood, remains a relic of the era. Despite the efforts of the revolutionary forces, the movement was expected to be quickly dismantled by the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]]. The rebellion occurred within a broader context of imperial instability, including riots, food shortages, and internal [[Guild]] violence following the death of [[the Emperor]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Baldezar Kern]] destroyed the armies of the [[South Sea Revolution]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Rudeus Maxwell]] retired from the [[Imperial army]] before the [[South Sea Revolution]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c3">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The South Sea Rebellion involved troops that were no longer required once [[Guild Head]] [[Kern]] joined the battle.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The South Sea Rebellion involved the use of maces that could crush ships.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Baldezar Kern]]'s [[Awakened maces]] helped sink the entire fleet of the South Sea Rebellion.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire events]]
